name: mettig
description: Mettig - local marketplace for services in Grozny and Chechnya

scripts.ci:local: npm --workspace backend run lint && npm --workspace backend run typecheck && npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace backend run test -- --passWithNoTests && npm --workspace apps/client run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/client run lint && npm --workspace apps/business run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/business run lint && npm --workspace apps/web run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/web run lint && npm --workspace apps/web run build && npm --workspace packages/shared run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/shared run lint && npm run format:check
